Inquiry.title: Inquiry
Inquiry.description: A lead or inquiry sent by a potential client through the smart contact form.

name.description: The name of the potential client.

business.description: The business name or project idea.

goal.description: The main goal of the website.

budget.description: The budget range for the project.

finish.description: The response to the discovery call question.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the inquiry was submitted.
